summary:
Step 6 'Expected the Trust Score on the results panel to be a number between 0 and 100.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

A trust score was displayed but the scan did not provide any finding that explains the disabled assertion (e.g., xit/test.skip) in the submitted diff.

Observations:
- The results panel shows a Trust Score of "100" and a green "Clean" message.
- The findings area reads "No Cheating Detected" / "This diff looks clean. Your AI agent passed the honesty check." — no suspicious finding is listed.
- The submitted diff contains a disabled test (the change from it(...) to xit(...)), but the app did not flag or explain this pattern.
